# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istiod
spec:
  profile: default
  components:
    ingressGateways:
    - name: istio-ingress
      enabled: true
    egressGateways:
    - name: istio-egress
      enabled: true
    pilot:
      k8s:
        env:
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          value: istio-system
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
        proxyAdminAccessLogLevel: debug
        enableEnvoyAccessLogs: true
        excludeOutboundPorts: "15020"
      sidecarInjector:
        enabled: true
        alwaysInject: true
  meshConfig:
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    outboundTrafficPolicy:
      mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
    serviceSettings:
    - name: "*"
      watchdog:
        enable: true
    admin:
      enabled: true
